name: sid-reference-project
description: Fetches SID composer/player/editor data from the DeepSID API into local JSON, builds a browsable HTML reference from it, and finds documentation gaps to report back upstream.

scripts.fetch:all: npm run fetch:players && npm run fetch:composers && npm run fetch:csdb && npm run fetch:player-media && npm run fetch:hvsc-docs
scripts.all: npm run fetch:all && npm run gaps && npm run build
scripts.refresh: node scripts/fetch-composers.js --refresh && node scripts/fetch-players.js --refresh && node scripts/fetch-csdb.js --refresh && node scripts/fetch-player-media.js --refresh && node scripts/fetch-hvsc-docs.js --refresh && npm run gaps && npm run build
